prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: You are on a manufacturing or assembly floor running standard work with quality gates. The work under review is Fall protection, part of the Safety & Rigging scope. The observed field condition is: frayed/burned webbing. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: OSHA 1926 Subpart M, 1910.140. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: Measurement check: Fall protection (production floor)
